content.cn_text: 第二部分。
content.en_text: Part 2.

content.cn_text: 你将听到一位导游介绍关于一个岛屿的建议。
content.en_text: You will hear an introduction from a tour guide about suggestions for an island.

content.cn_text: 首先，你有一些时间查看问题11-14。
content.en_text: First, you have some time to look at questions 11-14.

content.cn_text: 现在，请仔细听并回答问题11-14。
content.en_text: Now, listen carefully and answer questions 11-14.

content.cn_text: 大家好，我是Hazel，Travel Eye旅行社的导游。
content.en_text: Hello everyone, I'm Hazel, the guide from Travel Eye Agency.

content.cn_text: 自从我们在上一个节目中提到莫娜岛之行后，
content.en_text: Since we mentioned the trip to Moona Island in the last program,

content.cn_text: 我们收到了许多去过那里的游客发来的在线消息。
content.en_text: we've received several online messages from those who have been there.

content.cn_text: 因此，我们为新游客收集了一些有用的注意事项，
content.en_text: As a result, we've collected some helpful do's and don'ts for new visitors,

content.cn_text: 希望能帮助您更好地了解这个岛屿，并充分享受您的逗留。
content.en_text: which will hopefully help you to know the island better and enjoy your stay to the fullest.

content.cn_text: 第一个建议是关于小费。
content.en_text: The first suggestion is about tips.

content.cn_text: 尽管在莫娜岛的大多数情况下都需要给小费，
content.en_text: Although tipping is required in most circumstances in Moona Island,

content.cn_text: 你应该给的小费金额差别很大。
content.en_text: the amount you should give differs significantly.

content.cn_text: 如果你乘坐出租车，给司机多少小费没有固定费率。
content.en_text: If you take a taxi, there is no set rate on how much you should leave to the driver.

content.cn_text: 如果有人认为服务很棒，他可能会给一笔丰厚的小费。
content.en_text: Someone may give a generous tip if he thinks the service is fantastic.

content.cn_text: 这完全由你决定。
content.en_text: It's up to you entirely.

content.cn_text: 然而，如果你去理发店或在餐厅用餐
content.en_text: However, if you go to the hairdressers or enjoy a meal in the restaurant

content.cn_text: 并且账单没有服务费，建议给10%的小费。
content.en_text: and the bill comes with no service charge, a 10% tip is advisable.

content.cn_text: 莫娜岛的医疗服务相对不错。
content.en_text: Moona Island has got relatively good medical service.

content.cn_text: 如果你生病了，最快的方法是请酒店为你安排一位会说英语的医生。
content.en_text: If you get sick, the quickest way is to ask the hotel to arrange an English speaking doctor for you.

content.cn_text: 但请记住，这不是一项免费服务。
content.en_text: But remember, it's not a complimentary service.

content.cn_text: 另一种选择是去当地诊所，你也必须准备好支付费用。
content.en_text: The other alternative is to visit the local clinic and you have to prepare for the charge as well.

content.cn_text: 我应该提醒你，岛上的医疗服务可能很昂贵，
content.en_text: I should remind you that the medical service on the island can be pricey,

content.cn_text: 所以最好在离开前购买保险。
content.en_text: so it's better to buy your insurance before you leave.

content.cn_text: 当你访问莫娜岛时，你会看到几乎到处都有的告示。
content.en_text: When you visit Moona Island, you'll see the notice nearly everywhere.

content.cn_text: 自来水可以安全饮用，但你可能不习惯它的怪味
content.en_text: Tap water is safe to drink, but you might not get used to its weird taste

content.cn_text: 因为它含有矿物质。在这种情况下，你可以在每家商店买到瓶装水，
content.en_text: because it contains minerals. In this case, you can buy bottled water sold in every shop,

content.cn_text: 但你最好确保密封盖未被动过，
content.en_text: but you'd better make sure the sealed lid is untouched,

content.cn_text: 因为当地人经常把自来水装进瓶子里。
content.en_text: as the locals often put tap water into the bottle.

content.cn_text: 在你听完剩下的部分之前，你有一些时间查看问题15到20。
content.en_text: Before you hear the rest of the talk, you have some time to look at questions 15 to 20.

content.cn_text: 现在请听并回答问题15到20。
content.en_text: Now listen and answer questions 15 to 20.

content.cn_text: 接下来我将重点介绍莫娜岛的交通。
content.en_text: Then I'll focus on transportation in Moona Island.

content.cn_text: 公共汽车是当地居民最常用的交通工具。
content.en_text: The bus is the most commonly used means of transportation for local residents.

content.cn_text: 虽然公交线路不多，但它们总是很准时。
content.en_text: Although there aren't many bus lines, they're always on time.

content.cn_text: 然而，有些人抱怨路面崎岖不平，以至于他们感到恶心和头晕。
content.en_text: However, some people complained that the road was so bumpy that they even got nausea and dizziness.

content.cn_text: 因此，如果你想在途中平静放松地坐着，这不是一个好选择。
content.en_text: As a result, it's not a good choice if you want to sit peacefully and relax on the way.

content.cn_text: 另外，在你上车前，向司机询问公交车会去哪里。
content.en_text: And another thing is, before you jump on the bus, inquire of the driver about where the bus will go.

content.cn_text: 与莫娜岛的大多数城市不同，你不能在公交车前部找到目的地显示
content.en_text: Unlike most cities here in Moona Island, you cannot find the destination shown in front of the bus

content.cn_text: 或者在公交车站也找不到。也许你觉得公交服务不那么令人愉快。
content.en_text: or at the bus stop. Maybe you found the bus service is not so enjoyable.

content.cn_text: 在这种情况下，你总是可以租一辆车。
content.en_text: In that case, you can always rent a car.

content.cn_text: 如果你选择这种方式，我建议你提前做好准备。虽然一些出租车公司
content.en_text: If you choose this way, I advise you to prepare well beforehand. Although some taxi companies

content.cn_text: 提供租车服务，但许多游客有时会发现无人接听电话。
content.en_text: provide car rental services, many visitors sometimes find nobody answering the phone.

content.cn_text: 所以当你赶时间时，不要选择这种方式。比较几家租车公司是明智的
content.en_text: So leave this way when you are in a hurry. It's wise to compare several car rental companies

content.cn_text: 提前在线比较，因为价格可能会有很大差异。
content.en_text: online beforehand, as the price may vary a lot.

content.cn_text: 通过酒店预订可能会被多收费。因为它包含10%的佣金，所以也不建议这样做。
content.en_text: Booking via hotel may be overcharged. As it contains a 10% commission, so it's also not advisable.

content.cn_text: 更重要的是，别忘了与公司核实价格具体包含哪些内容。
content.en_text: More importantly, don't forget to check with the company what the price covers in detail.

content.cn_text: 例如每日租金、汽车保险、佣金等。
content.en_text: Like daily rental expenses, car insurance, commission, etc.

content.cn_text: 它通常也包括无限里程，但燃料不包括在内。
content.en_text: It usually includes unlimited mileage too, but fuel is excluded.

content.cn_text: 如果你不想开车，出租车是最快、最舒适的方式，
content.en_text: If you don't want to drive, a taxi is the quickest and most comfortable way,

content.cn_text: 尽管莫娜岛上出租车很少。如果你想快速找到一辆出租车，
content.en_text: although few are available on Moona Island. If you want to find a taxi quickly,

content.cn_text: 通过出租车公司预订不是个好主意，因为有时你需要等待很长时间，
content.en_text: it's not a good idea to reserve through the taxi company, as sometimes you'll have quite a wait,

content.cn_text: 尤其是在高峰期。最简单的方法就是在大街上挥手拦车
content.en_text: especially in the rush hour. The easiest way is just waving your hands on the street to stop

content.cn_text: 拦下出租车。否则，司机在加完油后会直接开走。
content.en_text: the taxi. Otherwise, the driver will drive away directly after he drops off the gas.

content.cn_text: 哦，还有一件事，我必须提醒你，莫娜岛的出租车没有计价器，
content.en_text: Oh, another thing is, I have to remind you that there is no meter for taxis in Moona Island,

content.cn_text: 所以你在上出租车前，最好和司机协商一下你要付多少钱
content.en_text: so before you jump in the taxi, you'd better negotiate with the driver about how much you're

content.cn_text: 你要付多少钱。例如，如果你晚上从机场乘坐出租车，可能会花费你，
content.en_text: going to pay. For example, if you take a taxi from the airport at night, it may cost you,

content.cn_text: 所以在上车前确认价格。好的，这就是我今天要分享的关于莫娜岛的所有小贴士。
content.en_text: so confirm the price before you get in. Okay, that's all about the tips for Moona Island

content.cn_text: 还有什么问题吗？
content.en_text: that I want to share today. And are there any questions?

content.cn_text: 第二部分到此结束。你现在有半分钟时间检查第二部分的答案
content.en_text: That is the end of part two. You now have half a minute to check your answers to part
two. 。

groups.desc: Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.
groups.title: Questions 11-20.

items.title: How much should visitors tip taxi drivers on the island?

options.title: A
options.content: as much as they feel right

items.title: What is mentioned about the medical service on the island?

options.title: B
options.content: Visitors should contact their insurance company.

options.title: C
options.content: Visitors have to find the hotel doctor.

items.title: The tour guide says the tap water
What point is made about bottled water?

options.title: B
options.content: The bottle is not always sealed.

items.title: What feature is mentioned about the bus on the island?
How can visitors know the destination of the bus on the island?

options.title: A
options.content: find it in front of the bus

options.title: C
options.content: find it at the bus stop

items.title: What does the tour guide advise visitors to do before renting a car?
When they rent a car, it's important for visitors to know

options.title: B
options.content: what is included in the price.

options.title: C
options.content: fuel is included in the price.

items.title: How can visitors find a taxi easily?

options.title: B
options.content: look for a taxi in advance

options.title: C
options.content: stop a taxi on the street

items.title: What is suggested by the tour guide about the taxi fee?

options.title: A
options.content: make sure no extra money is asked

options.title: B
options.content: check what is included in the fee

options.title: C
options.content: agree the price with the driver in advance
